title: Phase 001 — Deterministic HLD/LLD Narrative Generation for code_graph
description: Implement template-only HLD/LLD narrative layer over existing code_graph SQLite data. Headline ADOPT from 027 XCE research adoption matrix. ~250 LOC: 1 new lib + 1 new handler + 1 tool reg + 1 omni integration edit + tests. Zero LLM dependency, zero schema migration.
